steps.title: Count each side type
steps.content: There are $n$ sides of length $4\,\text{cm}$, $6n$ sides of length $9\,\text{cm}$, and $7$ sides of length $5\,\text{cm}$. The equation must count sides, not total centimeters.

steps.title: Add the side counts
steps.content:
The polygon has $42$ sides total, so the side counts must add to $42$:
$$n+6n+7=42$$

steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content:
Combine the two terms with $n$. This keeps all three side groups in the total count:
$$7n+7=42$$
The answer is B.
